# Vertical Banner Stand with Sign Topper | [★★★★★](#product-rvws) [Leave a Review](#product-rvws)

The Vertical Banner Stand includes the hardware, (2) 24" x 72" full color banners, and (2) 24" x 18" sign toppers. It works great for indoor display signage for promotions, events, and tradeshows. The Vertical Banner Stand hardware is very durable, made with a steel base plate that helps support stability. The stand supports two banners and two sign toppers that sits above the 6' banner for ultimate visibility.

**\*\* Please note: If you have more than one artwork file for this product, kindly leave a note in the order notes section. A representative will reach out to assist you in submitting the additional artwork. \*\***

![Vertical Banner Stand](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/0db86374-2fc5-426b-893e-620c49338995.jpg)

Material Choice:

(2) 13 oz Vinyl Banners for Banner Stands w/ Sign Topper (2) 18oz Heavy Duty Vinyl for Banner Stands w/ Sign Topper

Product: with Vertical Banner Stand - Hardware

Quantity:

(Min: 1, Max: 1000)

Size (H x W): 72" x 24"

72" x 24"

_Click on a template to customize your product_

This steel banner stand is built to last, with a heavy base plate for stability in high-traffic areas. Our stand holds two 2' × 6' banners, and includes the unique feature of holding two 24″ x 18″ stand toppers, to maximize your advertising budget and signage real estate. The stand topper sits above the 6′ banner for ultimate visibility.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Banner Stand Materials

**\*\*\* Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\***

There are two different materials available for the Vertical Banner Stand banner with an addional Sign Topper availble to add on. Banners are typically cut to the edge - no hemming is available. 

### 13 oz Vinyl Banners

13 oz vinyl is our most common banner material. Vinyl banners can be used indoors or outdoors.

### 18 oz Heavy Duty Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

### 4mm Coroplast Sign Topper

The Sign Topper add on is printed on 4mm coroplast material. These signs are printed in full-color and can be printed single or double-sided. The signs have hollow "flutes" on the inside of the material and are printed with a 1/2 inch wide edge.

[Click here to request a sample packet of materials](https://www.signmax.com/signmax-samples)

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### 3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard1.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver-compressed1.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### Upload a Print Ready File

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
